channel.title: Asan Emirsale personal page
channel.description: Recent content on Asan Emirsale personal page

item.title: Location
item.description: Addresses for correspondence with Asan Emirsaliev.

item.title: Samples of phonologic abnormalities in a locally spoken language of the Sudaq region. Subset 2.
item.description: This dataset contains some samples of abnormalities and azonal phenomena in Crimean Tatar dialects that might be atributed to substrat languages.

item.title: Office Hours
item.description: Schedule and location for Asan Emirsaiev's office hours.
